title: Concoction!
description: Enhances Food, Cooking and World Exploration . Vanilla+ Style.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/concoction)
[![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/concoction!)
  
[![GitHub Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/seb-sish/Concoction?style=for-the-badge&color=59A486)](https://github.com/seb-sish/Concoction/issues)
[![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/seb-sish/Concoction?style=for-the-badge&color=59A486)](https://github.com/seb-sish/Concoction/blob/main/LICENSE)



## 🧪 About *Concoction*

**Concoction** overhauls the food system in a way that **enhances exploration and immersion** while staying true to the Vanilla spirit.

Instead of punishing players for eating the same food, *Concoction* gives **every food its own niche effect**, turning even the most overlooked foods into valuable options. Many foods now have their own flavors, that impact your gameplay in different ways! Some flavors are better for fighting, others for farming and mining, and some flavors can help during building or grinding experience!

> ⚠️ This mod is still in development!  
> 🧵 Major updates come periodically—feedback is appreciated!



## ❓ Q&A

> 💬 Commonly asked questions.

**Q: Can you add compatibility with *Farmer's Delight*?**  
**A:** No. *Concoction* is a **standalone alternative** with its own goals. Compatibility would reduce design integrity and cause conflicts.

**Q: Is the mod still in development?**  
**A:** Yes! Development continues even if updates are spaced out. You can follow progress on our [GitHub](https://github.com/woofyboo/Concoction). Even if there hasn't been any recent activity there — it doesn't mean we don't work on it. We might just take a few weeks or a month off, or waiting for something important to happen before we continue.

**Q: Can I help translate the mod?**  
**A:** Absolutely! Submit localization files via GitHub—approved contributions will be added in future updates.

**Q: I found a bug or issue—what do I do?**  
**A:** Report it on our [GitHub issues page](https://github.com/woofyboo/Concoction/issues). We'll take a look as soon as possible.

**Q: Are beta versions safe to play?**  
**A:** Mostly, yes! Your world won’t be corrupted, but bugs might exist. Betas let you preview features and help improve stability.

**Q: I saw something in a screenshot that isn’t in-game?**  
**A:** Screenshots may include **beta features** or **content from future updates**. Make sure you’re using the latest version, or try a beta!


---


## 💡 We’re Open to Feedback

Got a cool idea or a suggestion?  
Leave a comment or open an issue on GitHub. We’re always happy to hear from you!
